overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a character in a long coat exploring a snowy coastal ruin at night. The character walks through snow-covered terrain, passes ancient stone architecture, briefly wades into dark water, and continues along the misty shoreline.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow towards ancient stone ruins visible in the distance

entered.detail: snow-covered ground with footprints and scattered debris
large rocks partially buried in snow
tall stone wall with weathered surfaces forming part of ancient ruins
faint orange light source visible in the distance near the ruins

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open snowy field at night, approaching ancient stone ruins in the distance. The terrain is covered in deep snow with scattered boulders, and a faint campfire glow is visible near the ruins ahead.

events.description: character reaches the ancient stone wall with large arches
character emerges from the wall structure to the open waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone wall, passing under arches while approaching the water's edge

entered.detail: massive stone wall with arched openings showing intricate masonry
dark water visible beyond the snowy shore

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside an ancient stone wall with large arches, moving from the open field toward the coast. The wall provides partial cover as the character approaches the water's edge, with the ocean becoming visible in the distance.

events.description: character steps into the water and begins wading through the shallows

agents.ego_description: wading through the dark coastal water, moving from one shore to another

entered.detail: dark blue water surrounding the character as they wade through

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dark coastal water, wading through the shallows with the ocean surrounding them. The water reaches waist-deep as the character moves steadily toward the opposite shore.

events.description: character exits the water and steps back onto the snowy shore

agents.ego_description: walking along the snowy coastline, navigating around rocks and tall grass while following the shore

entered.detail: snow-covered boulders and rocky outcrops along the shoreline
tall grass and reeds growing along the water's edge
steep rocky cliffs rising in the distance along the coast

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the water onto a snowy rocky coastline, continuing along the shore. Tall reeds line the water's edge to the right while distant cliffs rise on the left, with the ocean now visible to the side as the character progresses along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate snowy interior toward a rugged, moonlit coastline. It begins with the character traversing a wide-open snowy field dotted with boulders, moving steadily toward the faint glow of a campfire near distant stone ruins. As the character reaches the ruins, the scene shifts to a path alongside an ancient stone wall with large arches that guides the movement from the open plains toward the edge of the sea. The camera then follows the character as they leave the land behind to wade through the dark, waist-deep shallows of the ocean. Finally, the character emerges from the water onto a rocky shoreline, progressing past tall reeds and towering cliffs as the ocean remains visible to the side.
